title: Refactor Benchmark History Entry
description: Schema for a single performance benchmark entry in PERFORMANCE_HISTORY.md. Entries are produced by the RUN_BENCHMARKS console command and stored manually.

date.description: Date of the benchmark run in YYYY-MM-DD format.

commit.description: Short or full git commit SHA at the time of the benchmark.

notes.description: Optional notes about the benchmark run or architectural context.

benchmark.description: Results from the synthetic benchmark runner (RUN_BENCHMARKS).

normalizationItemsPerSec.description: Throughput of normalizeTypographyProps() in items per second. Null if pending.

groupingItemsPerSec.description: Throughput of groupItems() (enterprise scenario, 32K items) in items per second.

groupingScalingFactor.description: Average growth ratio when input doubles (1K→64K doubling series). 2.0 = linear.

scalingLinear.description: True if average scaling factor was within the linear budget (≤2.3×).

sortingGroupsPerSec.description: Throughput of groups.sort() in groups per second.

serializationMs.description: Time in ms to JSON.stringify an AuditResult with 32K items.

payloadKB.description: Serialized payload size in KB for 32K items.

regressionDetected.description: True if the runner detected any stage below regression threshold.

profiler.description: Results from the live in-plugin profiler on a real Figma file. Optional — requires a manual scan.

file.description: Description of the file used (e.g., "enterprise-design-system.fig", "400 text layers").

extractionMs.description: Property extraction time in ms (includes async yields).

constructionMs.description: AuditResult object construction time in ms.

progressEvents.description: Number of SCAN_PROGRESS messages sent during the scan.

examples.notes: Post-sprint baseline after O(n²) fix, string interning, Core Scan Engine, chunked pipeline.
